real black Mitozz bottle, black cap, and true label structure
brand_guardrails: make the frame useful for a held CTA
reject any bottle redraw that changes the real package
composition: large negative space in top and bottom areas

reference_strategy: Use editorial whitespace for the CTA-safe layout, product glow for finish, the bottle source as product truth, and the locked Mitozz bottle size spec for scale. Keep the end frame in the same morning workspace world as shots 01 to 03 and do not let the bottle identity drift. Bottle scale must remain realistic and slightly smaller than an oversized hero staging.
variation_guardrails: keep the final frame calmer than shot 03
preserve bottle orientation and environment continuity
leave larger negative space than the reveal shot
if the bottle drifts from the approved source, reject and regenerate
if the bottle feels too large or too isolated from the desk light, regenerate
match bottle size to the locked bottle size spec rather than enlarging it into a dominant ad object

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese

sora_handoff.shot_goal: Create a calm premium end frame that can hold the CTA cleanly.
sora_handoff.camera_motion: Almost static with a tiny breathing drift.
sora_handoff.prompt: Animate this source image into a calm premium end frame for a wellness reel. Keep the approved Mitozz bottle identity consistent with the previous product shot: black bottle, black cap, real silhouette, and real label structure. Use the locked Mitozz bottle size spec so the bottle feels realistically scaled for the tabletop and not oversized. In a 1536 x 2752 reel frame, keep the bottle roughly within 500 to 605 px tall and 215 to 275 px wide unless the shot becomes a pure product hero. Match the bottle highlights, shadow softness, and local contrast to the surrounding steel-blue morning desk light so it feels native to the scene. Use only minimal ambient motion and a nearly still camera. Preserve large clean text-safe areas for a soft CTA. Do not add new props, people, label redesign, recoloring, or movement.

notes: Shot 04 of the rebuilt March 25 reel set. Generate as PNG. This should be calmer than shot 03 and keep the real-bottle truth.
